0b2f3e7b2ad2.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
0b2f3e7b2ad2.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
0b2f3e7b2ad2.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

9b18eb27b4bc.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
9b18eb27b4bc.description: Only 8 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

6a7fff2b1d21.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
6a7fff2b1d21.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

5a1326f085aa.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
5a1326f085aa.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
5a1326f085aa.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
